name: peel_sun_layer
description: Peel back the Sun's layers to reveal a specific layer in the interactive visualization. Use when the child asks to see inside the Sun, or asks about a specific layer like the core, chromosphere, etc. Only works when the Sun detail page is open (navigate there first with navigate_to_sun if needed).

layer.description: Name of the Sun layer to peel to. One of: Corona, Chromosphere, Photosphere, Convective Zone, Radiative Zone, Core
